description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a crab, featuring a broad, slightly domed carapace with a mottled brown and reddish coloration. The crab has two prominent claws (chelae), with one noticeably larger than the other, and eight segmented walking legs that extend outward from the body. Its eyes are positioned on short stalks at the front of the carapace, giving it a distinctive appearance. The surface of the crab is hard and textured, with visible joints and spines along the legs and claws. The underside is lighter in color and less textured, while the dorsal side displays a more rugged, matte finish. The overall form is compact and robust, typical of crabs found in coastal or urban seafood markets.
description: A detailed, lifelike crab with a broad, mottled brown carapace, two large claws, and eight segmented legs, featuring hard, textured surfaces and eyes on stalks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crab's face, both claws (one larger), and eyes on stalks.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the carapace, the segmentation of the legs, and the profile of the claws.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carapace, the symmetrical arrangement of the legs, and the dorsal surface texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the crab, with visible leg segmentation and the underside of the body.
